old_value: {"id":"broadside-e37d.11","title":"Inbox handler (Follow, Undo Follow, discard)","description":"POST /users/{username}/inbox and POST /inbox (shared inbox). Verify HTTP signature on every request. For Follow: insert followers row (actor_uri, inbox_uri, shared_inbox_uri from actor doc fetch), send Accept{Follow} back to follower's inbox. For Undo{Follow}: delete followers row. For everything else: return 202 Accepted, do nothing. Reject unsigned or invalid-signature requests with 401.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:54.947308041Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:54.947308041Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.11","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:54.952273313Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.11","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:39:19.883936003Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.11","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:39:19.922614422Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
